athlete_id.description: Target athlete; defaults to selected athlete in coach mode, or the only athlete otherwise. Format: i12345 or 12345.

end_date.description: Inclusive end date as YYYY-MM-DD in the athlete timezone; must be on or after start_date.

include_full.description: When true, include bounded per-activity audit rows and diagnostics. Raw stream samples are never returned.

sport.description: Optional exact case-insensitive activity type or subtype filter.

start_date.description: Inclusive start date as YYYY-MM-DD in the athlete timezone; the range may contain at most 366 days.
